Horse TransportYou Can Trust

Professional, fully insured horse hauling across all 50 states in the USA and Canada. Wherever your horse needs to go, we'll get them there safely.

Book Transport Pay Online
About

Who We Are…

Brielle Williams Horse Transport is a professional, fully insured horse transport company dedicated to safe, caring, and reliable horse hauling. We haul across all 50 states in the USA and Canada — wherever your horse needs to go, we'll get them there.

As horse lovers and owners ourselves, we take immense pride in giving every horse we transport the best possible care from pickup to drop-off. Horse transport isn't just our business — it's our passion.

Whether you're moving a horse across town or across the country, we treat every animal like our own and keep you informed every step of the way.

Services

What We Do…

From private charter show loads to long-distance hauls, we provide safe, comfortable, and attentive transport for horses of all breeds and sizes.

🗺️

Location to Location

We transport your horses anywhere across the USA and Canada using our premium Cimarron trailer for safe, comfortable travel every mile.

🏆

Show & Competition

Private charter show transport. We coordinate timing and care so your horse arrives calm, healthy, and ready to compete at their best.

🛡️

How We Do It

Regular cleaning and sanitizing of our rig, scheduled stops, fresh hay and water throughout — every detail handled with professional care.

🐴

Local Transport

Same-day and next-day service for vet visits, farm moves, and short hauls with the same high level of professionalism every time.

🚨

Emergency Transport

Available 24/7 for urgent situations. Call +1 (937) 215-6232 anytime and we'll dispatch as quickly as possible for your horse.

📱

Trip Updates

Regular check-ins, updates, and photos throughout the journey so you always know your horse is safe, comfortable, and well cared for.

Process

What You Can Expect…

Whether this is your first time transporting a horse or just your first time with us, we walk you through every step from start to finish.

1

Request a Quote

Contact us by phone, email, or our booking form. We'll discuss your route, dates, and horse's specific needs.

2

Booking Confirmed

We confirm your booking with all details — pickup time, route plan, and any special care instructions for your horse.

3

Sign the Agreement

Complete and sign the transportation agreement online. Quick, easy, and legally binding for both parties.

4

Pay Securely Online

Pay your transport fee securely through our website using any major credit or debit card powered by Stripe.

5

Safe Arrival

Your horse arrives safe and sound with regular updates along the way and a final welfare check at delivery.

What's the First Step?

Ready to book or need a custom quote? Reach out today — we respond fast and are happy to answer all your questions.

Legal Agreement

Transportation Agreement

All clients must complete and sign this agreement before transport begins. Fill out below — a copy will be emailed to both you and Brielle.

HORSE TRANSPORTATION & HAULER AGREEMENT

Brielle Williams Horse Transport · Springfield, OH

1. Owner Information

2. Horse Information

3. Transportation Details

4. Terms & Conditions

Owner Requirements: Owner agrees to provide a current negative Coggins test, valid Interstate Health Certificate, and ensure horse is halter-broke, fit for travel, and free from contagious illness.

Emergency Veterinary Authorization: If Owner cannot be reached in an emergency, the Transporter is authorized to obtain emergency veterinary care. All expenses remain the Owner's responsibility.

Insurance & Risk: The Transporter maintains commercial liability insurance. Owner acknowledges the inherent risks of equine transportation and is encouraged to maintain mortality or medical insurance.

Cancellation Policy: If transport cannot be completed due to mechanical failure, weather, or emergencies beyond the Transporter's control, the Owner may reschedule or receive a full refund.

Release of Liability: Owner agrees to release and hold harmless the Transporter from claims arising during transport, except where gross negligence or willful misconduct is proven.

Payment: Wire Transfer — Account Holder: Brielle Williams | Bank: Lead Bank. Governing Law: State of Ohio.

5. Signature

By typing your name above, you agree this constitutes a legally binding electronic signature.

A copy will be emailed to briellewilliams870@gmail.com and to you for your records.
